items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding the OAuth consent screen clarity. However, there is no concrete evidence or API reads provided that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate various signature needs and workflows, but they do not address the specific validation of the OAuth consent screen, leading to an inconclusive status.
